title: Assistant Store Manager - Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions:
Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
